summary: Ocean2Joy v2.0 - Complete E2E testing of 12-stage Operational Chain flow. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI flows verified: login, dashboard (client/admin views), project creation, project details with StageActions, Deliverables section, 12-stage timeline with document links, completed project banner.
critical_code_review_comments: All 12 stage action endpoints properly validate role (admin vs client) and stage gating
Document numbers generated in correct format: {PROJECT_SHORT}-{DOC_CODE}-{SEQ:04d}-{YYMMDD}
PayPal email correctly returns 302335809@postbox.ge (NOT contact email ocean2joy@gmail.com)
Deliverable upload restricted to admin only after production_started and before delivered_at
Auto files_accessed_at set on first client download of deliverable
StageActions component correctly shows contextual buttons based on status + user role
Duplicate action prevention working (cannot activate order twice, etc.)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full 12-stage Operational Chain e2e tested and working. All role-based actions (admin: activate-order, send-invoice, start-production, mark-delivered, confirm-payment, complete; client: sign-invoice, confirm-delivery, accept-work, mark-payment-sent) validated. Stage gating enforced (cannot skip stages). Deliverable upload/download/delete working with proper restrictions. All 11 document types generate correctly with PDF output. Frontend StageActions component shows correct buttons based on status and role. Dashboard shows filter bar with all 12 status options. Admin view shows 'All Projects' with awaiting count. Client view shows 'Your Projects' with New Project button.

backend_api.project_creation: PASS - Generates project_number in format VAPP-{seq}-{Label}{Quote}USD-{DDMonYYYY}
backend_api.role_validation: PASS - Client blocked from admin endpoints (403), admin can access all
backend_api.stage_gating: PASS - Cannot skip stages (400 with descriptive error)
backend_api.full_12_stage_flow: PASS - All stages advance correctly with timestamps
backend_api.deliverable_upload: PASS - Admin only, after production_started, before delivered
backend_api.deliverable_download: PASS - Auto-sets files_accessed_at on first client download
backend_api.document_generation: PASS - All 11 types generate with correct number format
backend_api.chat_isolation: PASS - Messages isolated to their project
backend_api.duplicate_prevention: PASS - Cannot perform same action twice

frontend_ui.homepage: PASS - Ocean gradient hero, services section, footer with legal info
frontend_ui.login_page: PASS - Beach split-screen design, form validation working
frontend_ui.client_dashboard: PASS - 'Your Projects' heading, New Project button, status filter bar
frontend_ui.admin_dashboard: PASS - 'All Projects' heading, awaiting count, Quick Switch buttons
frontend_ui.new_project_form: PASS - Service type dropdown, brief textarea, script upload, validation
frontend_ui.project_details: PASS - Project header, quote block, StageActions, Deliverables, Chat, Timeline
frontend_ui.stage_actions: PASS - Contextual buttons based on status + role, dialogs for complex actions
frontend_ui.deliverables_section: PASS - Upload button (admin), download/delete buttons, file list
frontend_ui.operational_chain_timeline: PASS - 12 stages with timestamps, document links, PDF buttons
frontend_ui.completed_banner: PASS - Shows 'Project completed — thank you!' for completed projects
